release_rule: Every blocking gate must be passed with reviewable evidence before enterprise beta go/no-go may pass.

approval_model.aggregate_rule: The M0 gate is approved only when every decision is approved and has both required record types covering all required authorities.

requirement_locator_kinds.planned: A planned: locator describes work that does not exist and is valid only while the gate is not passed.
requirement_locator_kinds.repository: A repository-relative path, optionally followed by an RFC 6901 JSON Pointer fragment, identifies a test or profile definition but is not by itself a passing result.
requirement_locator_kinds.external: An https:// locator identifies externally retained evidence and requires an immutable digest plus accountable human verification; CI does not fetch external evidence.

evidence_model.repository_digest_rule: A local file record hashes exact file bytes. A record with a JSON Pointer hashes the selected value encoded by jq -S -c, including its trailing newline.
evidence_model.passed_gate_rule: Every requirement has a passing immutable record, no requirement or record locator is planned, and every repository JSON Pointer resolves.

beta_gates.title: Cross-scope isolation
beta_gates.acceptance: Two organizations, projects, and environments share one installation without cross-scope enumeration, mutation, routing, credential, usage, audit, media, or runtime leakage.

beta_gates.title: Independent environment runtime
beta_gates.acceptance: Environment activation and rollback are independent, each request pins one environment generation, and credential revocation meets the accepted propagation bound.

evidence_requirements.locator: planned:M2 runtime isolation and mixed-generation suite

beta_gates.title: Enterprise identity and delegated administration
beta_gates.acceptance: Custom scoped roles, group federation, SCIM deprovisioning, service accounts, short-lived machine credentials, fine-grained inference credentials, approval, break-glass, and complete offboarding pass conformance.

evidence_requirements.locator: planned:M3 identity and offboarding conformance suite

beta_gates.title: Provider extension and enterprise connectivity
beta_gates.acceptance: An external adapter installs and upgrades without rebuilding OLP, remains isolated, and passes private endpoint, proxy, custom CA, mTLS, external-secret, and workload-identity profiles.

evidence_requirements.locator: planned:M4 connector-v1 conformance and fault suite

beta_gates.title: Policy and economic integrity
beta_gates.acceptance: Versioned governance, hierarchical quota and budget reconciliation, bounded conditional routing, and explanations use production decision code without durable content capture.

evidence_requirements.locator: planned:M5 policy, quota-race, budget, and routing conformance suite

beta_gates.title: Fleet durability and lifecycle
beta_gates.acceptance: Gateway, control, and worker roles are multi-replica; durable work survives pod loss; rolling upgrade, restore, DR, and chaos targets pass without an application-role SPOF or acknowledged usage loss.

beta_gates.title: Enterprise operations and declarative management
beta_gates.acceptance: OTLP, scoped SLOs, audit/event export, canonical plan/apply/drift, Terraform, enterprise console flows, and redacted support diagnostics are supported production paths.

evidence_requirements.locator: planned:M7 telemetry, declarative, Terraform, and redaction conformance suite

beta_gates.title: Enterprise beta qualification and acceptance
beta_gates.acceptance: Security, capacity, compatibility, upgrade, restore, DR, reference deployment, support, and design-partner evidence is complete and a formal go/no-go record is approved.
